title: Neobank synthetic event envelope
description: Shared envelope for every synthetic backend event (the event-boundary contract). Timestamps are UTC ('Z' or '+00:00' only); a naive or non-UTC timestamp is invalid. Payloads are validated separately against the registered event/version schema.

event_id.description: Globally unique immutable identifier per emitted delivery.

idempotency_key.description: Stable across delivery duplicates of one business event.

source_service.description: Fictional producer service; membership is validated against the registry.

emitted_at.description: Producer emission time (UTC); not before occurrence unless a clock-skew scenario is injected.

ingested_at.description: Warehouse arrival time (UTC); may be deliberately late.

schema_version.description: Payload schema version, validated against the event registry.

payload.description: Validated against the named event/version payload schema.

generator_version.description: Exact generator release that produced the event.

scenario_id.description: Links the event to its scenario/truth manifest.
